name: countdown-1945
description: Chris Wallace and Mitch Weiss's Countdown 1945 — leadership and decision-making toolkit from the 116 days between FDR's death and the atomic bombing of Hiroshima
useCase: Helps leaders and decision-makers understand how to handle high-stakes decisions with incomplete information, navigate leadership transitions, manage massive secret projects, and make ethical choices under extreme pressure — through the lens of Truman's most consequential period.
knownRisks: Historical lessons are retrospective — real-time decision-making feels different than historical analysis
Military and wartime contexts may not translate directly to civilian leadership scenarios
